title: Ensure Rust cross-impl tests for ICMPv6/UDP malformed ingress
description: Add or extend vector tests in Rust crates (lichen-core/src/ipv6.rs tests, lichen-rpl, lichen-node tests, or fuzz targets) to match Python vectors for malformed ICMPv6/UDP cases. Verify specific error returns (Ipv6Error, drop without panic/leak). Update any dispatch/ingress paths if validation missing.
